— Established 2015

Built for
Champions

The Sunflower House is OG Esports' legendary training facility — now available for external teams and organizations. Train where champions are forged, in an environment purpose-built for competitive excellence.

Located just 26 km from Lisbon Airport and minutes from the Atlantic coast, combining elite gaming infrastructure with the comfort your squad needs to perform at the highest level.

🖥️
Pro Gaming Setups
Pro Gaming PCs · 400 Hz Monitors · Secretlab Electric Tables · Secretlab Chairs
🏠
Ultimate Comfort
13 Bedrooms · 11 Bathrooms · Daily Cleaning Services
💪
Wellness Zones
Gym · Pool · Jacuzzi · Outdoor Space · Ping Pong
👥
Staff
Experienced & Diverse Team · On-site Cooking Chef
🔒
Security
House equipped with security cameras and alarm systems throughout
🚗
Transport
Driver available for airport pick-up and other locations

Reservation

Hourly PC Rental
Short Stay
€15 / 3h
Per PC station · Minimum 3 hours

  • €15 per station for 3 hours
  • Training room access
  • High-speed internet
  • Flexible time slots

Most Popular
Daily Bootcamp Rental
Standard Bootcamp
€150 / day
6 PCs included · Full day access
  • 6 gaming stations
  • €150 flat rate per day
  • Full training room
  • Gym & pool access
  • House manager on-site
  • Flexible scheduling

— Location

Lisbon,
Portugal

Near Lisbon — one of Europe's fastest-growing esports hubs. Easy international access, affordable living, world-class quality of life.

— Trusted by Professionals

What Pros
Say

"
★★★★★

"Easy to fly into Lisbon, beach nearby for recovery days, and the house itself is simply the best bootcamp facility we've used. Will definitely be back."

P
Pro Player
International Team
"
★★★★★

"An exceptional facility. Everything a professional team needs is here — the hardware is top tier, the living spaces are comfortable, and the house manager made everything seamless."

E
Team Example
Esports Organization
"
★★★★★

"We came for a 2-week bootcamp before a major and the results speak for themselves. Training rooms are world-class and the recovery facilities kept the squad at 100%."

Y
Your Team
Professional Squad
